knowledge_objects.name: Inner Product
knowledge_objects.short_definition: An operation that takes two vectors and returns a scalar.
knowledge_objects.source_span: An inner product is an operation that takes two vectors and returns a scalar.

knowledge_objects.name: Dot Product
knowledge_objects.short_definition: The standard inner product in Euclidean space.
knowledge_objects.source_span: the standard inner product is the dot product

knowledge_objects.name: Orthogonal Vectors
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Two vectors are orthogonal when their inner product is zero.
knowledge_objects.source_span: Two vectors are orthogonal when their inner product is zero.

knowledge_objects.name: Orthogonal Projection
knowledge_objects.short_definition: A method for finding the closest point in a subspace to a given vector.
knowledge_objects.source_span: Orthogonal projection is a method for finding the closest point in a subspace to a given vector.

knowledge_objects.name: Projection Formula
knowledge_objects.short_definition: The formula for the projection of v onto the subspace spanned by u.

knowledge_objects.name: Least Squares Problem
knowledge_objects.short_definition: A problem that uses projection ideas to solve inconsistent systems.
knowledge_objects.source_span: Least squares problems use projection ideas to solve inconsistent systems.

knowledge_objects.name: Normal Equations
knowledge_objects.short_definition: The equations that give the solution to the least squares problem when columns of A are independent.
